narrative:
Bedford / Washington (precinct in Coshocton County) has 857 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
